final:
module register(
	input clk,
	input reset,
	input enable,
	input [3:0] d,
	output reg [3:0] q);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset)
        q <= 4'b0000;
    else if (enable)
        q <= d;
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= ~d;
    end
  end

endmodule
